allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: clean up VideoNotifier and remove anti-patterns

- Remove BuildContext dependency from provider \(Riverpod anti-pattern\)
- Move error handling to UI layer with try/catch
- Make RegExp static final to avoid per-instance allocation
- Remove unused displayListInfo method and instance fields
- Remove unnecessary StatefulBuilder from dialog
- Fix unhandled case when both videoId and playlistId are present

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: improve recipe extraction pattern matching

- Add support for more recipe heading formats \(■, 【, ◆, ●, ▼\)
- Check footer patterns only at line start to avoid breaking on inline URLs
- Add consecutive empty line detection for section boundaries
- Remove empty lines from output for cleaner result

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
